content:
Wordless Wednesday: Foliage

Ahh, Fall foliage. So pretty! As promised last Wednesday, this week is another shot by one of my wedding photographers last October! Isn’t this scenery gorgeous?! This is where I got married. <3

This particular photo is taken right next to a little wooden cabin that you can sit at in the middle of the woods at the Arboretum and relax… or pose for some fun photos like below!

I’d love to go back here and sit with a book on the chairs in front of the cabin. Where is your favorite little hideaway?
